summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ImplantTrack medical implant traceability application. Backend APIs tested with 92.3% success rate (12/13 tests passed). Frontend UI testing successful with full user workflow validation including registration, product/batch creation, navigation, and scanner functionality. Fixed critical timezone bug in batch creation.

critical_bugs.issue: Timezone-aware vs timezone-naive datetime comparison error in check_and_create_alerts function
critical_bugs.fix_applied: Added timezone-aware check for expiration_date in server.py line 363

minor_issues.issue: Scan test expected 404 but got 200 - found existing batch data
minor_issues.impact: Test expectation mismatch, but functionality works correctly

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console

passed_tests: Batch creation and listing (POST /api/batches, GET /api/batches) - after fix
Frontend user registration and login flow
Product creation via UI with form validation
Batch creation via UI with product selection
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Products, Batches, Scanner, Movements, Reports, Alerts)
Dashboard statistics display and real-time updates
